event_claims.description: sTec's board of directors established a special committee of independent directors to review strategic alternatives relating to sTec, including a potential sale, and to make recommendations to the full board.
event_claims.quote_text: Our board of directors established a special committee of independent directors (the “special committee”) to review strategic alternatives relating to sTec, including the potential sale of sTec, and to make recommendations to the full board of directors with respect to such matters.

event_claims.description: The special committee unanimously recommended that the board approve and adopt the merger and the merger agreement.
event_claims.quote_text: The special committee unanimously recommended that the board of directors approve and adopt the merger and the merger agreement.

event_claims.description: Before making its recommendation, the special committee reviewed the merger agreement and discussed the merger and merger agreement with sTec management and advisors.
event_claims.quote_text: Prior to its recommendation, the special committee reviewed the merger agreement and had discussions with sTec management and its advisors regarding the merger and the merger agreement.

event_claims.description: The board approved and adopted the merger agreement and merger upon the unanimous recommendation of the special committee.
event_claims.quote_text: Our board of directors, upon the unanimous recommendation of a special committee of our board of directors, unanimously approved and adopted the merger agreement and the merger
